references.passiveText: This isn't the first feud in {location}. The last one ended with a family leaving for good.
references.triggerDialogue: Years ago, two families fought over water rights so bitterly that one packed up and moved to a settlement {location_hint}. {target_npc} was friends with their eldest before the split. Word is they've prospered there, but they still carry resentment toward {location}. If the current feud gets bad enough, more families might follow their example.

references.passiveText: I know an elder in another settlement who's resolved disputes like this before.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} has a reputation for settling impossible feuds. They resolved a three-way land dispute in their own settlement that had dragged on for a decade. Fair-minded, patient, and nobody's fool. If things in {location} get truly intractable, it might be worth sending word to them {location_hint}. An outside perspective can cut through what locals can't see.
